title: Dense, Winey Mediterranean Dashi Wrap
description: A filling and flavorful whole30-friendly meal featuring corn flour, dashi-extract, and wrapped in a corn husk.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the ground lamb and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped tomatoes, artichoke hearts, and kalamata olives to the pan and cook for 2 minutes.
Stir in the dashi extract and chicken broth. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
Add the corn flour to the pan and stir to combine. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season the mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
Heat the corn husks in the oven or by steaming them until pliable.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the meat mixture onto the center of a heated corn husk and topping with fresh parsley.
